issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader's type includes 'Whitebeard Pirates', not if a card with that name is on board.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the effect lasts for the current turn phase, not until end of turn.
Should be 'OpponentCharacter' (singular) to match 'up to 1' in the text, though 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' likely handles this correctly depending on implementation.
